name: http-query
description: The @kevincii/http-query ecosystem — a type-safe, QUERY-first toolkit for complex API reads (core, client, react, next).

scripts.build: npm run build -w @kevincii/http-query-core && npm run build -w @kevincii/http-query-client && npm run build -w @kevincii/http-query-react && npm run build -w @kevincii/http-query-next
scripts.test: npm run test -w @kevincii/http-query-core -- --run && npm run test -w @kevincii/http-query-client -- --run && npm run test -w @kevincii/http-query-react -- --run && npm run test -w @kevincii/http-query-next -- --run
